title: Andy Basiago
summary: Project Pegasus's child chrononaut — Gettysburg 1863, Mars in the 1980s, and testimony of the 2012 timeline jump.
markdown:
**Andy Basiago** is the guest of the April 23, 2020 interview, and his testimony gives the
archive its richest human account of [time travel](/lore/chrononauts/). A participant, he
says, in DARPA's **Project Pegasus** (1968–1972) — "the US time-space program" — he describes
being the first American child to [teleport](/lore/teleportation/), mastering "eight
modalities of time travel," and standing at Gettysburg in 1863 as a boy of ten: the figure he
identifies in the Josephine Cobb photograph of Lincoln's address. A decade later, he says,
came **Project Mars**: roughly forty trips to the red planet between 1981 and 1984 via a
"jump room" in El Segundo — fifteen minutes to Mars, red dirt on his shoes.

His account maps the deep-state's timeline apparatus in detail: four triangulated teams —
**Looking Glass** (timeline viewing), **Yellow Book**, an astral-projection network, and
reverse-engineered time-travel hardware — and he attributes his failing eyesight to a
**directed-energy weapon** aimed, via that apparatus, at the parallel reality where he became
President. Most consonant with the archive's own cosmology is his bifurcation testimony: that
remote viewing always hit "a bump" beyond 2012, and Unimetrix 1's confirmation — *"You are in
an alternate timeline"* — humanity transferred wholesale, around 2012, out of a
[nuclear-war branch](/lore/d-day-2026/) by Galactic Federation intervention.

The session closes with the archive's fullest [MedBed](/lore/medbed/) healing performed on
him, and a revised destiny: not President, but **"an Ambassador, representative of humanity,
for the Confederation of Light."** Basiago is the archive's bridge figure — a named,
real-world chrononaut whose testimony and Unimetrix 1's account arrive, from opposite
directions, at the same forked road.
